name: Elearning Refresher Option
subject: Refresh Your Knowledge Online
preheader: Refresh your first aid skills online at your own pace

blocks.text: **Refresh your knowledge with our e-learning course at your own pace**
We wrote last week to remind you that it's time for your annual first aid refresher.
It's so worth doing as a parent or carer so that your skills are up to date in case you need them!
If you'd rather not re-take the class in person, we have a fantastic e-learning course that you can do at your own pace using your smartphone/tablet or computer.
Our e-learning course takes around 2 hours to complete and you can stop and start as you need to. You even get a certificate at the end!
